text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. It involves two main tasks: image recognition, which identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which locates and labels specific items within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision systems recognize traffic signs, detect pedestrians, and track other vehicles to navigate safely. Other applications include facial recognition for security, medical image analysis, and automated quality control in factories. As the technology improves, computer vision will continue to transform many aspects of our daily lives.
